counters.description: when annie has the maximum of her stacks stay away from her and pay attention to her passive that is able to stun you and subsequently apply a combo to inflict serious damage on you, being an assassin could kill you, in this case i recommend a hard cc or hard ap build (malmortius and wit's end) with dance of death. waits for her to waste her stacks to engage her.
pay attention to his q, able to grab you and drag you to unpleasant places where u can be killed xd, wait to use your e since blitz immediately after his q will use the e
tank too well and apply different stuns thanks to its passive that can also be applied by the adc, i recommend maximum caution
difficult to have an impact against her before level 6, so try to engage with more aggression after level 6, with the help of the jungler. she is among the toughest adc to face
its w is incredibly dangerous as it won't allow you to use your e to escape, slowing you down for several seconds while dealing massive damage.
he is an opponent not only too tank but with too much sustain, being able to kill him of x is difficult.
galio's problem is its taunt, and the immense combo damage it can do, and it's tank too.
stay away from its barrels, a successful combo is able to melt you if you don't have the death's dance. against him i recommend death's dance and edge of night and randuin if he is full build too.
morgana will only use q and e against you, her e is able to stop grabs, but without both it is useless, take advantage of it.
if you feed enough and snowball, it will one shot you and die very often if you don't have death's dance accompanied at edge of night.

samira if joined by support like leona is all too effective (broken champ) if in the hands of a capable person, it will make your life hell. it must be stopped before it feeds too much otherwise the game is lost.
much like cassiopeia, its w slows you down in a very similar way by not letting you use yours and even though its range is much narrower. be very careful and don't hire him without a plan.

soraka with the use e is able to cancel your q or launch your x or e ... since it silences and its high sustain makes it a formidable support in the late game, the part of the game where pyke is already harder to play it.
much like leona, after her combo, if she gets off her horse, she will have almost 0 mobility, try to dodge everything and surprise her with an aggressive counter to punish her.
very tanky and with a lot of cc, it might be able to get the better of you.
anivia has the resurrection passive, so avoid using your x if the passive is active (you will see a particular gray in her level that will let you know if she is up).
thanks to his e he is able to escape from your grabs, so the best advice is to keep your q as long as possible and to use it only after he has used his and, in this way you will be able to catch it.

leona is among the tanks with the most cc, at the first levels it's easy to get the better of her. after level 5-6, she will take advantage of you, so make sure you already have 4-5-6 kills in lane before level 6, otherwise in mid / late game u will lose.
nami is very strong against you both because of her small sustain, able to negate your x and if accompanied by lucian, which from the first levels will start to destroy you.

if pantheon has full stacks you should stay away from him if you don't want to get a full combo that takes more than half your life. engage it carefully and grab it as little as possible because of its w.
the problem with rakan is his high mobility, u will have to have a lot of patience and not waste your grabs too much to win. watch out for its w, if you can dodge it in time you can do something
senna is not a support, but a 2nd adc -.- and for this reason it will punish you a lot every time it approaches you, as well as having sustain

dodge his e and if he grabs you, try not to suffer the whole full combo. force him if you can get him to use his ultimate .. then grab him and punish him with yours e to stun him, get away from him to make him waste it.

he will pok you indefinitely by making you back up under the tower and giving you little room to act, but the biggest problem is his ultimate able to resurrect a teammate, try not to kill before the hourglasses run out, do not throw your x unnecessarily.
try to step on as many plants as possible against zyra if you can but in general, dodge her e then engage her, if u can
hard if adc is a typical disgusting broken champ... vayne/twitch/kog etc... + polymorph + enoooormibus... -.- really a disgusting nightmare
if you don't get grabbed during match too much, you will win this game

when annie has the maximum of her stacks stay away from her and pay attention to her passive that is able to stun you and subsequently apply a combo to inflict serious damage on you, being an assassin could kill you, in this case i recommend a hard cc or hard ap build (malmortius and wit's end) with dance of death.
its w is incredibly dangerous as it won't allow you to use your e to escape, slowing you down for several seconds while dealing massive damage.
anivia has the resurrection passive, so avoid using your x if the passive is active (you will see a particular gray in her level that will let you know if she is up).
galio's problem is its taunt, and the immense combo damage it can do, and it's tank too.

if pantheon has full stacks you should stay away from him if you don't want to get a full combo that takes more than half your life. engage it carefully and grab it as little as possible because of its w.

dodge his e and if he grabs you, try not to suffer the whole full combo. force him if you can get him to use his ultimate .. then grab him and punish him with yours e to stun him, get away from him to make him waste it.
try to step on as many plants as possible against zyra if you can but in general, dodge her e then engage her, if u can
1 vs 1 hard to kill.. u should always prefer 2 vs 1 or 2 vs 2

synergies.description: his r is perfect for your x... so wait her and later x in right moment to do pentakill :) if u can xd
his r is perfect for your x... so wait her and later x in right moment

her passive increases the hp regeneration of your passive, making you stronger, plus you will receive more exp thanks to nilah's passive, and combined with your money passive, it makes nilah one of the best adc for pyke.
his r is perfect for your x... so wait her and later x in right moment to do pentakill :) if u can xd
your grab gives yasuo the ability to use the ultimate, a great adc or mid for pyke if played well
pyke as talon is able to cross walls with his e, and to be almost as fast as him in the jungle, which makes them great roammers together, able to gank distant areas in no time
a great adc for pyke thanks to its one hit damage and cc
jhin works very well with pyke because of his spells, together they wreak havoc
kaisa if used well is a good ally for pyke
mf if used well is a good ally for pyke
samira is broken... togheter to pyke still more xd
usually if pyke is mid and alistar is sup, this pair is at their best in team fights
its w makes enemies converge in the center of the marked area, great for a good x
his ultimate and taunt will help pyke a lot, and being a tank he'll have his back if he's a decent galio
his ultimate traps enemies, great for x
his ultimate traps enemies stunning it for 2-3 seconds, great for x
his r is perfect for your x... so wait her and later x in right moment to do pentakill :) if u can xd
his cc and grab combined with pyke's grab + e and x will make enemies hate these two champions
if you use your x after its ultimate, correctly, it will certainly kill someone
his cc and mobility combined with pyke's grab + e and x will make enemies hate these two champions
his ultimate is perfect for a pentakill
his ultimate + plants upgraded and poisons is perfect for a good x
a good adc for pyke
a good adc for pyke
a good adc for pyke
a good adc for pyke
a good adc for pyke, strong in late game if u snowball her much.. try to gift so much money to her
a good adc for pyke

it's not a good adc for pyke, but if used in the right hands or a one trick or main it's ok, but don't want to play it often, you probably only win because you can kill a lot or your team is a team that brings you to victory
it might be worth it to be his sup, if it weren't that very often kalista will troll your x, using his ult and this will send you mad, so try to coordinate well
having a lot of mobility, try to give caitlin visibility in order to use the ultimate and kill the dying enemy. if caitlin can't kill with her ultimate, try x early.
